problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Carbon. Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
